creator: luca.pizzamiglio@gmail.com
text:
gdb 7.3.1 crashes (segmentation fault) when you try to debug a multithread
application. This patch solves this serious stability bug.

gdb 7.x versions are important, because advanced IDEs (like KDevelop 4)
require at least gdb 7, they doesn't work with gdb 6.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
